with __dbt__cte__src_ecommerce_orders as (
WITH raw_ecommerce_orders AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
       `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622.dbt_stage.raw_ecommerce_orders_1`
)
SELECT
    order_id
,order_date
,user_id
,order_status
,order_amount
,last_updated
FROM
    raw_ecommerce_orders
) SELECT
    order_id,
    CAST(order_date AS DATE) AS order_date,
    user_id,
    order_status,
    order_amount,
    CAST(last_updated AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_updated
FROM __dbt__cte__src_ecommerce_orders

WITH  __dbt__cte__src_hosts as (
WITH raw_hosts AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
       `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`raw_hosts`
)
SELECT
    id AS host_id,
    NAME AS host_name,
    is_superhost,
    created_at,
    updated_at
FROM
    raw_hosts
), src_hosts as (
    SELECT *
    FROM __dbt__cte__src_hosts
)

SELECT
  host_id,
  IFNULL(host_name, 'Anonymous') AS host_name,
  is_superhost,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM
  src_hosts

WITH  __dbt__cte__src_listings as (
WITH raw_listings as (

SELECT
id as listing_id
,listing_url
,name as listing_name
,room_type
,minimum_nights
,host_id
,price as price_str
,created_at
,updated_at
FROM
`dbt-analytics-engineer-403622.dbt_stage.raw_listings`

)

SELECT * FROM raw_listings
), src_listings AS (
    SELECT * FROM __dbt__cte__src_listings
)
SELECT 
  listing_id,
  listing_name,
  room_type,
  CASE
    WHEN minimum_nights = 0 THEN 1
    ELSE minimum_nights
  END AS minimum_nights,
  host_id,
  price_str AS price,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM
  src_listings

WITH sales_data AS (
  SELECT
    order_date AS sale_date,
    SUM(order_amount) AS total_sales
  FROM `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`stg_ecommerce_orders`
  WHERE order_status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'returned') -- Exclude cancelled or returned orders
  GROUP BY order_date
)

SELECT * FROM sales_data

-- Incremental logic

  -- Add a condition to select only new or updated records
  WHERE sale_date > (SELECT MAX(sale_date) FROM `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`fct_daily_sales`)

WITH  __dbt__cte__src_reviews as (
WITH raw_reviews as (

SELECT
listing_id
,date as review_date
,reviewer_name
,comments as review_text
,sentiment as review_sentiment
FROM
`dbt-analytics-engineer-403622.dbt_stage.raw_reviews`

)


SELECT * FROM raw_reviews
), src_reviews AS (
 SELECT * FROM __dbt__cte__src_reviews
)
SELECT
 to_hex(md5(cast(coalesce(cast(listing_id as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(review_date as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(reviewer_name as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(review_text as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as string)))
 AS review_id,
 *
 FROM src_reviews
WHERE review_text is not null

 AND review_date > (select max(review_date) from `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`fct_reviews`)

WITH
l AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`dim_listings_cleansed`
),
h AS (
    SELECT * 
    FROM `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`dim_hosts_cleansed`
)

SELECT 
    l.listing_id,
    l.listing_name,
    l.room_type,
    l.minimum_nights,
    l.price,
    l.host_id,
    h.host_name,
    h.is_superhost as host_is_superhost,
    l.created_at,
    GREATEST(l.updated_at, h.updated_at) as updated_at
FROM l
LEFT JOIN h ON (h.host_id = l.host_id)

WITH fct_reviews AS (
    SELECT * FROM `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`fct_reviews`
),
full_moon_dates AS (
    SELECT * FROM `dbt-analytics-engineer-403622`.`dbt_stage`.`seed_full_moon_dates`
)

SELECT
  r.*,
  CASE
    WHEN fm.full_moon_date IS NULL THEN 'not full moon'
    ELSE 'full moon'
  END AS is_full_moon
FROM
  fct_reviews
  r
  LEFT JOIN full_moon_dates
  fm
    ON 1=1
--   ON (r.review_date =  fm.full_moon_date)
